'''chashumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibbling|nibbling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibbling|nibbling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chashumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshimith|chæshimith]] || [[word:chæshimij|chæshimij]] || [[word:chæshimish|chæshimish]] || [[word:chæshimi|chæshimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashushumuth|chashushumuth]] || [[word:chashushumuj|chashushumuj]] || [[word:chashushumush|chashushumush]] || [[word:chashushumu|chashushumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashumuth|chashumuth]] || [[word:chashumuj|chashumuj]] || [[word:chashumush|chashumush]] || [[word:chashumu|chashumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashufmuth|chashufmuth]] || [[word:chashufmuj|chashufmuj]] || [[word:chashufmush|chashufmush]] || [[word:chashufmuf|chashufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashumuthu|chashumuthu]] || [[word:chashumuju|chashumuju]] || [[word:chashumushu|chashumushu]] || [[word:chashumuku|chashumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashumuth|chashumuth]] || [[word:chashumuj|chashumuj]] || [[word:chashumush|chashumush]] || [[word:chashumu|chashumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashumuthul|chashumuthul]] || [[word:chashumujul|chashumujul]] || [[word:chashumushul|chashumushul]] || [[word:chashumukul|chashumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashumuthuthu|chashumuthuthu]] || [[word:chashumujuju|chashumujuju]] || [[word:chashumushushu|chashumushushu]] || [[word:chashumuku|chashumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashumuthun|chashumuthun]] || [[word:chashumujun|chashumujun]] || [[word:chashumushun|chashumushun]] || [[word:chashumukun|chashumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashumuthuoro|chashumuthuoro]] || [[word:chashumujuoro|chashumujuoro]] || [[word:chashumushuoro|chashumushuoro]] || [[word:chashumukuoro|chashumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
